name: Delta Calculator
description: Calculates the difference between two tags (A - B)
author: NISystem
code:
# Delta Calculator
# Simple difference: A - B
# Common uses: Delta_P (pressure drop), Delta_T (temperature difference)

tag_a = config.get('tag_a', 'Pressure_In')
tag_b = config.get('tag_b', 'Pressure_Out')
output_name = config.get('output_name', 'Delta_P')
use_abs = config.get('absolute_value', False)

a = tags.get(tag_a, 0)
b = tags.get(tag_b, 0)

delta = a - b

if use_abs:
    delta = abs(delta)

publish(f'py.{output_name}', delta)
